bot.command.branch: Create and switch to a Git branch
bot.command.provider: Choose the provider for new sessions
bot.command.switch: List sessions or switch to one
bot.error.command_failed: ⚠️ Command failed. Check the server log for details.
common.agent_already_running: ⏳ An agent is already running on project '{project_folder}'. Please wait for it to finish.
common.current_project_not_git: ⚠️ Current project is not a git repository.
common.no_active_session:
No active session.
Please run /project and /new first.
common.no_project_selected:
No project selected.
Please run /project <project_folder> first.
common.project_busy:
An agent is currently running on project '{project_folder}'.
Only /current and /abort are supported until it finishes.
common.project_folder_missing: ⚠️ Project folder no longer exists for this session: {project_folder}
git.branch_unknown: ⚠️ Could not determine the branch for the current session.
git.push_cancelled_checkout_failed: Push cancelled. Failed to switch to `{branch_name}` first.
message.photo_only_codex: Photo attachments are currently supported only for codex sessions.
message.question_queued: Question queued as Q{question_number}. It will run after the current agent task finishes.
message.unsupported_message_type:
Unsupported message type.
This bot currently accepts only text messages and photos.
queue.continue_prompt: The previous run was aborted. Do you want to continue processing the pending queued questions?
queue.continuing: Continuing with the pending queued questions.
queue.group_guidance_1: Group questions only when they are closely related and each question is reasonably short.
queue.group_guidance_2: Combining too many questions can make the prompt too large or reduce the agent's focus.
queue.no_batch_pending: No queued batch is waiting for a decision.
queue.processing_grouped: Processing the queued questions as one batch.
queue.processing_single: Processing the queued questions one by one.
runtime.active_run_stall:
The current agent run appears stuck.
The local agent process is still running but has not produced output.
On macOS, this might be because a hidden permission dialog is waiting for confirmation on the machine running the bot.
runtime.photo_too_large: Photo is too large. The maximum supported size is 5 MB.
runtime.replacement_session_stall:
Replacement session creation appears stuck.
The local agent process is still running but has not produced output.
On macOS, this might be because a hidden permission dialog is waiting for confirmation on the machine running the bot.
runtime.sensitive_diff_omitted:
{path}
This file contains sensitive content and was omitted.
status.abort_signal_sent: Abort signal sent for the current project run.
status.no_running_agent: No running agent process was found for the current project.
switch.current_project_filter: Current project filter for native sessions: {project_folder}
switch.current_project_filter_none: Current project filter for native sessions: (none)
switch.native_import_note: Selecting a native CLI session imports it into state.json and switches the bot to it.
switch.session_not_found:
⚠️ Session not found.
Run /switch to list available sessions.
bootstrap.env_created_locale_line: Created {env_path}. APP_LOCALE was initialized to {app_locale} based on this system language.
bootstrap.env_created_change_line: To use another language later, edit APP_LOCALE in {env_path}.
